ValidationRule.description: A validation rule that checks (at case closing) that if either of the Risk of Death or Injury fields and Erroneous Results Reported is ‘Yes’ then the value of the ‘Type of Case’ needs to be ‘Complaint - Quality’
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_008: The value of the ‘Type of Case’ needs to be ‘Complaint - Quality’ if Erroneous Results Reported and/or Risk of Death or Injury is set to Yes
